hotspots.title: Trump administration’s Iran war costs and strategies
hotspots.blurb: The Trump administration's ongoing conflict with Iran dominates coverage, with articles highlighting troop withdrawals from Germany, rejected peace proposals, and rising economic costs like fuel prices. The administration's defiance of court orders and congressional deadlines adds to the charged discourse.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to its high-stakes geopolitical implications, economic fallout, and the administration's confrontational stance with allies and legal institutions.

hotspots.title: Magyar Péter’s nepotism and government formation
hotspots.blurb: Hungary's incoming Prime Minister Péter Magyar faces intense scrutiny over nepotistic appointments, including his brother-in-law as Justice Minister, and controversies surrounding campaign financing. The discourse highlights systemic corruption and public backlash.
hotspots.affect: This commands attention due to the moral outrage over nepotism, the perceived betrayal of anti-corruption promises, and the implications for Hungary's democratic institutions.

hotspots.title: Reform UK’s Nigel Farage and crypto controversies
hotspots.blurb: Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, faces intense scrutiny over a £5 million crypto donation, alleged conflicts of interest, and far-right ties among candidates. The discourse highlights financial transparency issues and the party's radicalization.
hotspots.affect: This commands attention due to the financial scandal, the party's growing influence, and the moral outrage over its extremist associations.

hotspots.title: Vox’s ‘national priority’ and regional pacts in Spain
hotspots.blurb: Vox's campaign in Andalusia and other regions focuses on 'national priority' policies, anti-immigration rhetoric, and opposition to EU trade deals. The discourse highlights the party's growing influence and confrontational stance with mainstream parties.
hotspots.affect: This commands attention due to the polarizing rhetoric, the party's electoral impact, and the moral panic over immigration and EU policies.
